title: setaria australiensis
intro: Setaria australiensis, also known as Australian bristle grass, is a species of grass native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Setaria australiensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Setaria australiensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
